examples.en: We did an experiment to test the idea.
examples.zh: 我們做了一個實驗來驗證這個想法。

examples.en: The experiment took two hours to finish.
examples.zh: 這個實驗花了兩個小時才完成。

img: scientist mixing liquids in test tubes

examples.en: Students observe the plant every day.
examples.zh: 學生每天觀察這株植物。

examples.en: We observed how the water changed color.
examples.zh: 我們觀察水如何變色。

img: person looking through a magnifying glass

examples.en: Our hypothesis was that heat speeds it up.
examples.zh: 我們的假設是熱能加快它的速度。

examples.en: The results support the hypothesis.
examples.zh: 結果支持這個假設。

img: notebook with a question mark and diagram

examples.en: We collected data during the test.
examples.zh: 我們在測試時收集了數據。

examples.en: The data shows a clear pattern.
examples.zh: 這些數據顯示出明顯的規律。

img: spreadsheet with numbers and charts

examples.en: Please measure the length of the wire.
examples.zh: 請測量這條電線的長度。

examples.en: We measure the temperature every hour.
examples.zh: 我們每小時測量一次溫度。

img: hand using a ruler on a bench

examples.en: A water molecule has three atoms.
examples.zh: 一個水分子有三個原子。

examples.en: Heat makes the molecules move faster.
examples.zh: 熱使分子移動得更快。

img: colorful ball-and-stick molecule model

examples.en: Everything is made of tiny atoms.
examples.zh: 萬物都是由微小的原子組成。

examples.en: An atom has a center called a nucleus.
examples.zh: 原子有個中心叫做原子核。

img: atom with orbiting electrons diagram

examples.en: Wear gloves when you touch chemicals.
examples.zh: 碰化學物質時要戴手套。

examples.en: The two chemicals reacted quickly.
examples.zh: 這兩種化學物質很快就起反應。

img: labeled glass bottles on a lab shelf

examples.en: The reaction gave off a lot of heat.
examples.zh: 這個反應放出大量的熱。

examples.en: Mixing them starts a fast reaction.
examples.zh: 把它們混合會引發快速反應。

img: bubbling flask with colored liquid

examples.en: Oxygen is a common element in air.
examples.zh: 氧是空氣中常見的元素。

examples.en: Each element has its own symbol.
examples.zh: 每個元素都有自己的符號。

img: periodic table of elements chart

examples.en: Every living thing is made of cells.
examples.zh: 每個生物都是由細胞構成。

examples.en: We looked at plant cells under a microscope.
examples.zh: 我們用顯微鏡觀察植物細胞。

img: plant cell diagram with nucleus

examples.en: A tiny organism can live in one drop of water.
examples.zh: 一滴水裡就能住著微小的生物。

examples.en: Some organisms need sunlight to grow.
examples.zh: 有些生物需要陽光才能生長。

img: microscope view of tiny living creatures

examples.en: This forest has many bird species.
examples.zh: 這座森林有許多鳥類物種。

examples.en: Scientists found a new species of fish.
examples.zh: 科學家發現了一種新的魚類物種。

img: row of different animal species illustrations

examples.en: Put the sample under the microscope.
examples.zh: 把樣本放到顯微鏡下。

examples.en: The microscope makes small things look big.
examples.zh: 顯微鏡讓小東西看起來變大。

img: student looking into a lab microscope

examples.en: No food is allowed in the laboratory.
examples.zh: 實驗室裡不准吃東西。

examples.en: She works in a science laboratory.
examples.zh: 她在科學實驗室工作。

img: modern lab with benches and equipment

examples.en: The temperature rose after ten minutes.
examples.zh: 十分鐘後溫度上升了。

examples.en: We record the temperature in a chart.
examples.zh: 我們把溫度記錄在表格裡。

img: thermometer showing rising red line

examples.en: The sun gives us light and energy.
examples.zh: 太陽給我們光和能量。

examples.en: Moving objects have energy.
examples.zh: 運動中的物體具有能量。

img: glowing lightning bolt and battery

examples.en: A push is a kind of force.
examples.zh: 推是一種力。

examples.en: The force moved the box across the floor.
examples.zh: 這個力把箱子推過地板。

img: hand pushing a box with arrow

examples.en: Gravity pulls the apple to the ground.
examples.zh: 重力把蘋果拉向地面。

examples.en: There is less gravity on the moon.
examples.zh: 月球上的重力比較小。

img: apple falling from tree to ground

examples.en: We measured the mass of each rock.
examples.zh: 我們測量了每塊石頭的質量。

examples.en: A bigger object often has more mass.
examples.zh: 較大的物體通常質量較大。

img: balance scale weighing two objects

examples.en: The bottle holds a large volume of water.
examples.zh: 這個瓶子能裝很大體積的水。

examples.en: We poured it in to check the volume.
examples.zh: 我們把它倒進去以確認容量。

img: measuring cylinder filled with blue liquid

examples.en: Water is a clear liquid.
examples.zh: 水是一種透明的液體。

examples.en: The ice turned into liquid.
examples.zh: 冰變成了液體。

img: clear liquid poured into a beaker

examples.en: Ice is water in its solid form.
examples.zh: 冰是水的固體形態。

examples.en: A rock is a hard solid.
examples.zh: 石頭是堅硬的固體。

img: ice cube next to a stone

examples.en: The water boiled and turned into gas.
examples.zh: 水沸騰後變成氣體。

examples.en: Air is a mix of many gases.
examples.zh: 空氣是多種氣體的混合物。

img: steam rising from a hot kettle

examples.en: Stir the salt to make a solution.
examples.zh: 攪拌鹽以製成溶液。

examples.en: The solution turned light blue.
examples.zh: 這個溶液變成淺藍色。

img: beaker of blue liquid being stirred

examples.en: Sand and water make a simple mixture.
examples.zh: 沙和水構成一種簡單的混合物。

examples.en: We stirred the mixture slowly.
examples.zh: 我們慢慢地攪拌這個混合物。

img: bowl of sand and water mixed together

examples.en: We took a water sample from the river.
examples.zh: 我們從河裡取了一份水樣本。

examples.en: Label each sample clearly.
examples.zh: 把每個樣本清楚地標示好。

img: small test tubes with labels in a rack

examples.en: The result surprised the whole class.
examples.zh: 這個結果讓全班都很驚訝。

examples.en: We wrote down our results in a table.
examples.zh: 我們把結果寫進表格裡。

img: chart with a highlighted final number

examples.en: Record the time when it changes.
examples.zh: 在它變化時記錄下時間。

examples.en: She recorded every number carefully.
examples.zh: 她仔細地記錄下每個數字。

img: hand writing numbers on a clipboard

examples.en: Can you predict what will happen next?
examples.zh: 你能預測接下來會發生什麼嗎?

examples.en: We predicted the ice would melt fast.
examples.zh: 我們預測冰會很快融化。

img: person pointing at a rising graph line

examples.en: Compare the two samples side by side.
examples.zh: 把兩個樣本並排比較。

examples.en: We compared the old and new results.
examples.zh: 我們比較了舊的和新的結果。

img: two beakers placed side by side

examples.en: Let's analyze the data together.
examples.zh: 我們一起來分析這些數據。

examples.en: She analyzed the test results carefully.
examples.zh: 她仔細分析了測試結果。

img: person studying charts on a screen

examples.en: The whole process takes three steps.
examples.zh: 整個過程分成三個步驟。

examples.en: We watched the growing process daily.
examples.zh: 我們每天觀察生長的過程。

img: flow chart with arrows and steps

examples.en: We used a simple method to test it.
examples.zh: 我們用一個簡單的方法來測試。

examples.en: This method gives clear results.
examples.zh: 這個方法能得到清楚的結果。

img: numbered steps written on a whiteboard

examples.en: The data gives strong evidence.
examples.zh: 這些數據提供了有力的證據。

examples.en: We need more evidence to be sure.
examples.zh: 我們需要更多證據才能確定。

img: magnifying glass over a document

examples.en: Our conclusion was that heat helps.
examples.zh: 我們的結論是熱能有幫助。

examples.en: Write your conclusion at the end.
examples.zh: 在最後寫下你的結論。

img: checkmark at bottom of a report page

examples.en: The theory explains why it happens.
examples.zh: 這個理論解釋了為什麼會發生。

examples.en: Many tests support this theory.
examples.zh: 許多測試支持這個理論。

img: chalkboard with equations and diagrams

examples.en: We studied the structure of the leaf.
examples.zh: 我們研究了葉子的結構。

examples.en: The model shows the structure clearly.
examples.zh: 這個模型清楚地呈現了結構。

img: cross-section diagram of a leaf

examples.en: The function of roots is to take in water.
examples.zh: 根的功能是吸收水分。

examples.en: Each part has its own function.
examples.zh: 每個部分都有它自己的功能。

img: labeled plant with roots and arrows

examples.en: Muscle tissue helps us move.
examples.zh: 肌肉組織幫助我們活動。

examples.en: This tissue is made of many cells.
examples.zh: 這個組織由許多細胞構成。

img: microscope slide of pink tissue

examples.en: Some bacteria can make us sick.
examples.zh: 有些細菌會讓我們生病。

examples.en: We grew bacteria in a dish.
examples.zh: 我們在培養皿裡培養細菌。

img: petri dish with growing bacteria

examples.en: Lemon juice is a weak acid.
examples.zh: 檸檬汁是一種弱酸。

examples.en: The acid turned the paper red.
examples.zh: 這個酸讓試紙變成紅色。

img: dropper adding liquid to red test paper

examples.en: Water boils at one hundred degrees.
examples.zh: 水在一百度時沸騰。

examples.en: Boil the liquid until it bubbles.
examples.zh: 把液體煮到冒泡為止。

img: beaker of bubbling water over flame

examples.en: The ice began to melt in the sun.
examples.zh: 冰在太陽下開始融化。

examples.en: We timed how fast it melted.
examples.zh: 我們計算它融化的速度。

img: ice cube melting into a puddle

examples.en: Salt will dissolve in warm water.
examples.zh: 鹽會溶解在溫水中。

examples.en: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
examples.zh: 攪拌到糖溶解為止。

img: sugar disappearing into a glass of water

examples.en: The sponge can absorb a lot of water.
examples.zh: 這塊海綿能吸收很多水。

examples.en: Roots absorb water from the soil.
examples.zh: 根從土壤中吸收水分。

img: sponge soaking up spilled water

examples.en: Watch how the water flows down.
examples.zh: 觀察水如何往下流動。

examples.en: Electricity flows through the wire.
examples.zh: 電流流過這條電線。

img: water flowing through clear tubes

examples.en: The current makes the small bulb light up.
examples.zh: 電流讓小燈泡亮起來。

examples.en: We measured the current in the circuit.
examples.zh: 我們測量了電路中的電流。

img: simple circuit with battery and bulb

examples.en: We found the average of all the numbers.
examples.zh: 我們算出所有數字的平均值。

examples.en: The average was close to ten.
examples.zh: 平均值接近十。

img: calculator next to a list of numbers

examples.en: We need an accurate measurement.
examples.zh: 我們需要準確的測量。

examples.en: The scale gives accurate numbers.
examples.zh: 這個秤能給出準確的數字。

img: digital scale showing an exact reading
